speaker: LUCIO
text: If the Duke, with the other dukes, come not to

speaker: LUCIO
text: composition with the King of Hungary, why then all

speaker: LUCIO
text: the dukes fall upon the King.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Heaven grant us its peace, but not

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: the King of Hungary’s!

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Amen.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Thou conclud’st like the sanctimonious pirate

speaker: LUCIO
text: that went to sea with the ten commandments but

speaker: LUCIO
text: scraped one out of the table.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: “Thou shalt not steal”?

speaker: LUCIO
text: Ay, that he razed.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Why, ’twas a commandment to command

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: the Captain and all the rest from their functions!

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: They put forth to steal. There’s not a soldier of

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: us all that in the thanksgiving before meat do relish

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: the petition well that prays for peace.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: I never heard any soldier dislike it.

speaker: LUCIO
text: I believe thee, for I think thou never wast where

speaker: LUCIO
text: grace was said.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: No? A dozen times at least.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: What? In meter?

speaker: LUCIO
text: In any proportion or in any language.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: I think, or in any religion.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Ay, why not? Grace is grace, despite of all

speaker: LUCIO
text: controversy; as, for example, thou thyself art a

speaker: LUCIO
text: wicked villain, despite of all grace.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Well, there went but a pair of shears

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: between us.

speaker: LUCIO
text: I grant, as there may between the lists and the

speaker: LUCIO
text: velvet. Thou art the list.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: And thou the velvet. Thou art good

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: velvet; thou ’rt a three-piled piece, I warrant thee. I

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: had as lief be a list of an English kersey as be piled,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: as thou art piled, for a French velvet. Do I speak

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: feelingly now?

speaker: LUCIO
text: I think thou dost, and indeed with most painful

speaker: LUCIO
text: feeling of thy speech. I will, out of thine own

speaker: LUCIO
text: confession, learn to begin thy health, but, whilst I

speaker: LUCIO
text: live, forget to drink after thee.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: I think I have done myself wrong,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: have I not?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Yes, that thou hast, whether thou

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: art tainted or free.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Behold, behold, where Madam Mitigation

speaker: LUCIO
text: comes! I have purchased as many diseases under

speaker: LUCIO
text: her roof as come to—

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: To what, I pray?

speaker: LUCIO
text: Judge.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: To three thousand dolors a year.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Ay, and more.

speaker: LUCIO
text: A French crown more.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Thou art always figuring diseases in

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: me, but thou art full of error. I am sound.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Nay, not, as one would say, healthy, but so sound

speaker: LUCIO
text: as things that are hollow. Thy bones are hollow.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Impiety has made a feast of thee.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: How now, which of your

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: hips has the most profound sciatica?

speaker: BAWD
text: Well, well. There’s one yonder arrested and

speaker: BAWD
text: carried to prison was worth five thousand of you all.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Who’s that, I pray thee?

speaker: BAWD
text: Marry, sir, that’s Claudio, Signior Claudio.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Claudio to prison? ’Tis not so.

speaker: BAWD
text: Nay, but I know ’tis so. I saw him arrested, saw

speaker: BAWD
text: him carried away; and, which is more, within these

speaker: BAWD
text: three days his head to be chopped off.

speaker: LUCIO
text: But, after all this fooling, I would not have it so!

speaker: LUCIO
text: Art thou sure of this?

speaker: BAWD
text: I am too sure of it. And it is for getting Madam

speaker: BAWD
text: Julietta with child.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Believe me, this may be. He promised to meet

speaker: LUCIO
text: me two hours since, and he was ever precise in

speaker: LUCIO
text: promise-keeping.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: Besides, you know, it draws something

speaker:
SECOND
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: near to the speech we had to such a purpose.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: But most of all agreeing with the

speaker:
FIRST
               
              GENTLEMAN
text: proclamation.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Away. Let’s go learn the truth of it.

speaker: BAWD
text: Thus, what with the war, what with the sweat,

speaker: BAWD
text: what with the gallows, and what with poverty, I am

speaker: BAWD
text: custom-shrunk.

speaker: BAWD
text: How now? What’s the news with you?

speaker: POMPEY
text: Yonder man is carried to prison.

speaker: BAWD
text: Well, what has he done?

speaker: POMPEY
text: A woman.

speaker: BAWD
text: But what’s his offense?

speaker: POMPEY
text: Groping for trouts in a peculiar river.

speaker: BAWD
text: What? Is there a maid with child by him?

speaker: POMPEY
text: No, but there’s a woman with maid by him.

speaker: POMPEY
text: You have not heard of the proclamation, have you?

speaker: BAWD
text: What proclamation, man?

speaker: POMPEY
text: All houses in the suburbs of Vienna must be

speaker: POMPEY
text: plucked down.

speaker: BAWD
text: And what shall become of those in the city?

speaker: POMPEY
text: They shall stand for seed. They had gone down

speaker: POMPEY
text: too, but that a wise burgher put in for them.

speaker: BAWD
text: But shall all our houses of resort in the suburbs

speaker: BAWD
text: be pulled down?

speaker: POMPEY
text: To the ground, mistress.

speaker: BAWD
text: Why, here’s a change indeed in the commonwealth!

speaker: BAWD
text: What shall become of me?

speaker: POMPEY
text: Come, fear not you. Good counselors lack no

speaker: POMPEY
text: clients. Though you change your place, you need

speaker: POMPEY
text: not change your trade. I’ll be your tapster still.

speaker: POMPEY
text: Courage. There will be pity taken on you. You that

speaker: POMPEY
text: have worn your eyes almost out in the service, you

speaker: POMPEY
text: will be considered.

speaker: BAWD
text: What’s to do here, Thomas Tapster? Let’s

speaker: BAWD
text: withdraw.

speaker: POMPEY
text: Here comes Signior Claudio, led by the Provost

speaker: POMPEY
text: to prison. And there’s Madam Juliet.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Fellow, why dost thou show me thus to th’ world?

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Bear me to prison, where I am committed.

speaker: PROVOST
text: I do it not in evil disposition,

speaker: PROVOST
text: But from Lord Angelo by special charge.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Thus can the demigod Authority

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Make us pay down for our offense, by weight,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: The words of heaven: on whom it will, it will;

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: On whom it will not, so; yet still ’tis just.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Why, how now, Claudio? Whence comes this restraint?

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: From too much liberty, my Lucio, liberty.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: As surfeit is the father of much fast,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: So every scope by the immoderate use

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Turns to restraint. Our natures do pursue,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Like rats that raven down their proper bane,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: A thirsty evil, and when we drink, we die.

speaker: LUCIO
text: If I could speak so wisely under an arrest, I

speaker: LUCIO
text: would send for certain of my creditors. And yet, to

speaker: LUCIO
text: say the truth, I had as lief have the foppery of

speaker: LUCIO
text: freedom as the mortality of imprisonment. What’s

speaker: LUCIO
text: thy offense, Claudio?

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: What but to speak of would offend again.

speaker: LUCIO
text: What, is ’t murder?

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: No.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Lechery?

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Call it so.

speaker: PROVOST
text: Away, sir. You must go.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: One word, good friend.—Lucio, a word with you.

speaker: LUCIO
text: A hundred, if they’ll do you any good. Is lechery

speaker: LUCIO
text: so looked after?

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Thus stands it with me: upon a true contract

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: I got possession of Julietta’s bed.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: You know the lady. She is fast my wife,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Save that we do the denunciation lack

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Of outward order. This we came not to

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Only for propagation of a dower

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Remaining in the coffer of her friends,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: From whom we thought it meet to hide our love

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Till time had made them for us. But it chances

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: The stealth of our most mutual entertainment

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: With character too gross is writ on Juliet.

speaker: LUCIO
text: With child, perhaps?

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Unhappily, even so.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: And the new deputy now for the Duke—

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Whether it be the fault and glimpse of newness,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Or whether that the body public be

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: A horse whereon the governor doth ride,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Who, newly in the seat, that it may know

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: He can command, lets it straight feel the spur;

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Whether the tyranny be in his place

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Or in his eminence that fills it up,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: I stagger in—but this new governor

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Awakes me all the enrollèd penalties

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Which have, like unscoured armor, hung by th’ wall

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: So long that nineteen zodiacs have gone round,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: And none of them been worn; and for a name

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Now puts the drowsy and neglected act

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Freshly on me. ’Tis surely for a name.

speaker: LUCIO
text: I warrant it is. And thy head stands so tickle on

speaker: LUCIO
text: thy shoulders that a milkmaid, if she be in love, may

speaker: LUCIO
text: sigh it off. Send after the Duke and appeal to him.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: I have done so, but he’s not to be found.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: I prithee, Lucio, do me this kind service:

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: This day my sister should the cloister enter

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: And there receive her approbation.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Acquaint her with the danger of my state;

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Implore her, in my voice, that she make friends

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: To the strict deputy; bid herself assay him.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: I have great hope in that, for in her youth

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: There is a prone and speechless dialect

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Such as move men. Besides, she hath prosperous art

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: When she will play with reason and discourse,

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: And well she can persuade.

speaker: LUCIO
text: I pray she may, as well for the encouragement of

speaker: LUCIO
text: the like, which else would stand under grievous

speaker: LUCIO
text: imposition, as for the enjoying of thy life, who I

speaker: LUCIO
text: would be sorry should be thus foolishly lost at a

speaker: LUCIO
text: game of tick-tack. I’ll to her.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: I thank you, good friend Lucio.

speaker: LUCIO
text: Within two hours.

speaker: CLAUDIO
text: Come, officer, away.
